creator: netchild@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Bryan Drewery from comment #5)
It was a bug in the first place to have it with a hyphen. The language in the corresponding docs didn't spell it out directly (fixed recently), but having the filename different from rc variable name was not intended. So this is basically fixing a bug. So far I have added UPDATING entries every time I committed a fix myself, and suggested to do so at every PR.
